sentences.english: When my American friend visited Korea, she was surprised by many things.
sentences.korean: 미국인 친구가 한국을 방문했을 때 많은 것에 놀랐어요.

sentences.english: First, she couldn't believe how fast the internet was.
sentences.korean: 먼저 인터넷이 얼마나 빠른지 믿을 수 없어 했어요.

sentences.english: She was also amazed that you can get food delivered at any time of day or night.
sentences.korean: 밤낮 상관없이 음식을 배달시킬 수 있다는 것에도 놀랐어요.

sentences.english: The one thing she found difficult was taking off her shoes every time she entered someone's home.
sentences.korean: 어렵게 느꼈던 한 가지는 누군가의 집에 들어갈 때마다 신발을 벗는 거였어요.

sentences.english: But overall, she said Korea was one of the most exciting places she'd ever visited.
sentences.korean: 하지만 전반적으로 한국이 지금까지 방문한 곳 중 가장 흥미진진한 곳 중 하나라고 했어요.
